case_title: WESTERN MERCHANDISE MART, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP vs. PURCELL INDUSTRIES, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
